page_title: "truewatch_monitor Resource - truewatch"
subcategory: ""
description: |-
  Monitor Resource
  The truewatch_monitor resource manages monitor checker rules in TrueWatch Cloud.
  Example Usage
  ```terraform
  resource "truewatchmonitor" "example" {
    type                = "trigger"
    status              = 0
    tags                = ["example", "terraform"]
    secret              = "secretxxxxx"
    openpermissionset = false
    permissionset      = []
    alertpolicy_uuids  = []
  extend = jsonencode({
      isNeedCreateIssue = false
      issueLevelUUID    = ""
      needRecoverIssue  = false
    })
  jsonscript = {
      type                      = "simpleCheck"
      title                     = "SSH Service Exception"
      message                   = ">Content: Host SSH Status Failed\n>Suggestion: Check Host SSH Service Status"
      every                     = "1m"
      interval                  = 300
      recoverneedperiodcount = 2
      disablecheckendtime    = false
      groupby                  = ["host"]
  targets = [{
    dql   = "M::`ssh`:(count(`ssh_check`)) BY `host`"
    alias = "Result"
    qtype = "dql"
  }]

  checker_opt = {
    info_event = false

    rules = [
      {
        condition_logic = "and"
        status          = "critical"

        conditions = [{
          alias    = "Result"
          operator = ">="
          operands = ["90"]
        }]
      },
      {
        condition_logic = "and"
        status          = "error"

        conditions = [{
          alias    = "Result"
          operator = ">="
          operands = ["0"]
        }]
      },
    ]
  }

  channels            = []
  at_accounts         = []
  at_no_data_accounts = []

  }
  }
  ```

# truewatch_monitor (Resource)

# Monitor Resource

The `truewatch_monitor` resource manages monitor checker rules in TrueWatch Cloud.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "truewatch_monitor" "example" {
  type                = "trigger"
  status              = 0
  tags                = ["example", "terraform"]
  secret              = "secret_xxxxx"
  open_permission_set = false
  permission_set      = []
  alert_policy_uuids  = []

  extend = jsonencode({
    isNeedCreateIssue = false
    issueLevelUUID    = ""
    needRecoverIssue  = false
  })

  json_script = {
    type                      = "simpleCheck"
    title                     = "SSH Service Exception"
    message                   = ">Content: Host SSH Status Failed\n>Suggestion: Check Host SSH Service Status"
    every                     = "1m"
    interval                  = 300
    recover_need_period_count = 2
    disable_check_end_time    = false
    group_by                  = ["host"]

    targets = [{
      dql   = "M::`ssh`:(count(`ssh_check`)) BY `host`"
      alias = "Result"
      qtype = "dql"
    }]

    checker_opt = {
      info_event = false

      rules = [
        {
          condition_logic = "and"
          status          = "critical"

          conditions = [{
            alias    = "Result"
            operator = ">="
            operands = ["90"]
          }]
        },
        {
          condition_logic = "and"
          status          = "error"

          conditions = [{
            alias    = "Result"
            operator = ">="
            operands = ["0"]
          }]
        },
      ]
    }

    channels            = []
    at_accounts         = []
    at_no_data_accounts = []
  }
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `json_script` (Attributes) Rule configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--json_script))

### Optional

- `alert_policy_uuids` (List of String) Alert policy UUIDs.
- `dashboard_uuid` (String) Associated dashboard ID.
- `extend` (String) Additional information (fields related to exception tracking and some fields used for frontend echo).
- `open_permission_set` (Boolean) Enable custom permission configuration, (default false: not enabled), after enabling, the operation permission of the rule is based on permissionSet.
- `permission_set` (List of String) Operation permission configuration, configurable (roles (except owners), member uuid, team uuid).
- `secret` (String) Unique identifier secret for the middle section of the Webhook address (generally take a random uuid to ensure uniqueness within the workspace).
- `status` (Number) Monitor status, 0: enabled, 2: disabled, default enabled.
- `tags` (List of String) Tag names for filtering.
- `type` (String) Monitor type, default trigger, trigger: normal monitor, smartMonitor: smart monitor.

### Read-Only

- `create_at` (Number) The timestamp seconds of the resource created at.
- `monitor_name` (String) The name of the monitor.
- `monitor_uuid` (String) The uuid of the monitor.
- `update_at` (Number) The timestamp seconds of the resource updated at.
- `uuid` (String) The uuid of resource.
- `workspace_uuid` (String) The uuid of the workspace.

<a id="nestedatt--json_script"></a>
### Nested Schema for `json_script`

Required:

- `type` (String) Check method type.

Optional:

- `at_accounts` (List of String) Account UUID list to be @ under normal detection.
- `at_no_data_accounts` (List of String) Account UUID list to be @ under no data circumstances.
- `channels` (List of String) Channel UUID list.
- `checker_opt` (Attributes) Check condition settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--json_script--checker_opt))
- `disable_check_end_time` (Boolean) Whether to disable end time limit.
- `every` (String) Check frequency.
- `group_by` (List of String) Trigger dimension.
- `interval` (Number) Query interval, i.e., the time range difference for one query.
- `message` (String) Event content.
- `recover_need_period_count` (Number) Specify after how many check cycles an exception generates a recovery event.
- `targets` (Attributes List) Check targets. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--json_script--targets))
- `title` (String) Generated event title.

<a id="nestedatt--json_script--checker_opt"></a>
### Nested Schema for `json_script.checker_opt`

Optional:

- `info_event` (Boolean) Whether to generate info events during continuous normal operation.
- `rules` (Attributes List) Trigger condition list. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--json_script--checker_opt--rules))

<a id="nestedatt--json_script--checker_opt--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `json_script.checker_opt.rules`

Required:

- `condition_logic` (String) Logic between conditions, and/or.
- `conditions` (Attributes List) Conditions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--json_script--checker_opt--rules--conditions))
- `status` (String) When the condition is met, the status of the output event.

<a id="nestedatt--json_script--checker_opt--rules--conditions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `json_script.checker_opt.rules.status`

Required:

- `alias` (String) Detection object alias, i.e., the above targets[#].alias.
- `operands` (List of String) Operand array. (Operators like between, in need multiple operands).
- `operator` (String) Operator, =, >, <, etc.




<a id="nestedatt--json_script--targets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `json_script.targets`

Required:

- `alias` (String) Alias.
- `dql` (String) DQL query statement.

Optional:

- `qtype` (String) Query type.
